input.content: Search X since 2026-07-15 for posts mentioning any of: Verdikta, @verdikta19633, "AI-judged bounties", bounties.verdikta.org, "AI arbiter Base", "AI bounty escrow". For each post return: @handle, full text, date, whether the author reads as a project or builder (from bio/links), engagement counts, and the direct link https://x.com/handle/status/ID.
